articles.titleKo: 이라크 투자청장 해임 투표
articles.summaryKo:
이라크 국회가 투자청장을 해임하기로 결정했다.
이는 청장이 불참한 상태에서 진행된 질의응답 후 이루어진 조치이다.
해임 결정은 정치적 논란을 불러일으킬 것으로 예상된다.
이 사건은 이라크의 투자 환경에 중대한 영향을 미칠 수 있다.
국회는 청장의 해임을 위한 투표를 실시했다.
해임은 청장이 질의응답에 불참한 후 이루어졌다.

articles.titleKo: 이라크, 미국과의 관계 재정립을 위한 총리의 워싱턴 방문
articles.summaryKo:
이라크 총리 알리 파흘리 알자이디가 미국을 방문하여 양국 관계의 미래를 논의하였다.
이 방문은 이라크의 정치적 및 경제적 상황에 중요한 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상된다.
총리의 방문은 이라크와 미국 간의 관계를 강화하기 위한 노력으로 해석.
미국의 지원이 이라크의 경제 회복에 필요하다는 점이 강조됨
지역 정세의 변화가 양국 관계에 미치는 영향에 대한 논의가 이루어짐.
이 방문은 이라크의 정치적 안정성을 높일 가능성.
articles.description: امنية الدفاع الروسية تعلن إسقاط 93 مسيرة أوكرانية خلال الليلة الماضية الأربعاء 15 , تموز 2026 08:15 | امنية | عدد القراءات : 158 بغداد / نينا/ اعلنت وزارة التربية نتائج الامتحانات العامة للدراسة المهنية / الدور الأول، بجميع فروعها، للعام الدراسي (2025–2026)./انتهى9 رابط النتائج https://thankful-sea-0c283ca10.7.azurestaticapps.net/ الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 21:24 بغداد / نينا / اهتمت الصحف الصادرة في بغداد اليوم الاثنين ، الثالث عشر من تموز ، بزيارة رئيس مجلس الوزراء علي فالح الزيدي لواشنطن ، وتأثيرها في رسم مستقبل العلاقة بين العراق والولايات المتحدة .. وقالت صحيفة / الصباح / التي تصدر عن شبكة الاعلام العراقي :" بين متغيّراتٍ إقليميَّةٍ متسارعةٍ وطمو الاثنين 13 , تموز 2026 00:51 بغداد / نينا/ اهتمت صحيفتان عراقيتان صادرتان اليوم الأربعاء الثامن من تموز بمراسم تشييع جثمان المرشد الإيراني في النجف وكربلاء ، وإعداد إستراتيجية لتعظيم الإيرادات المحلية. وذكرت صحيفة /الزمان / - طبعة العراق ان محافظتي النجف وكربلاء تستقبل، جثمان المرشد الإيراني علي خامنئي، بعد انهاء تحضيرات ت الأربعاء 08 , تموز 2026 09:40

articles.title: Iraqi PM holds Pentagon talks with US Defense Secretary - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 이라크 총리, 미국 국방장관과 펜타곤 회담
articles.summaryKo:
이라크 총리 알자이디가 미국 국방장관과의 회담을 통해 양국의 안보 및 전략적 협력을 심화하였다.
이번 회담은 이란 지원 무장단체의 영향력을 제한하고 이라크의 국가 주권을 강화하기 위한 논의가 포함되었다.
알자이디 총리는 미국과의 경제적 관계 강화를 위해 투자 유치에 대한 논의를 진행하였다.
미국은 이란 지원 무장단체의 영향력을 제한하고 이라크 정부의 무기 통제를 강조하였다.
안보 협력은 양국의 전략적 동맹의 중요한 요소로 자리잡고 있다.
양국 간의 안보 협력 확대 필요.
articles.description: Washington (IraqiNews.com) — Iraqi Prime Minister and Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces Ali Falih Al-Zaidi paid a high-profile visit to the Pentagon on Friday, meeting with US Secretary of Defense […] Washington (IraqiNews.com) — Iraqi Prime Minister and Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces Ali Falih Al-Zaidi paid a high-profile visit to the Pentagon on Friday, meeting with US Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth to deepen bilateral security and strategic collaboration. Hegseth greeted Al-Zaidi with an official honor cordon at the Pentagon before the two leaders discussed military cooperation and wider security challenges between Iraq and the United States. The Pentagon meeting came after Al-Zaidi met with US President Donald Trump at the White House, where they discussed boosting economic ties, luring American investment, and deepening the two nations’ long-term strategic alliance. While economic growth has dominated the prime minister’s visit, conversations with US military officials are expected to focus on Iraq’s changing security situation following the end of the US-led coalition’s combat campaign against ISIS. The negotiations come as Al-Zaidi’s administration seeks to enhance state authority by ensuring that all weapons remain under government control, while also working to modernize Iraq’s security institutions and bolster national sovereignty. Washington has consistently urged Baghdad to restrict the impact of Iran-backed armed groups and strengthen security under the Iraqi state, making military cooperation a critical component of the strategic alliance, alongside burgeoning economic and energy ties. Al-Zaidi’s tour to Washington has included investment, financial, and security diplomacy, highlighting Iraq’s aim to increase collaboration with the US while also pushing economic reforms and building national institutions.

articles.fullText: Washington (IraqiNews.com) — Iraqi Prime Minister and Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces Ali Falih Al-Zaidi paid a high-profile visit to the Pentagon on Friday, meeting with US Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth to deepen bilateral security and strategic collaboration. Hegseth greeted Al-Zaidi with an official honor cordon at the Pentagon before the two leaders discussed military cooperation and wider security challenges between Iraq and the United States. The Pentagon meeting came after Al-Zaidi met with US President Donald Trump at the White House, where they discussed boosting economic ties, luring American investment, and deepening the two nations’ long-term strategic alliance. While economic growth has dominated the prime minister’s visit, conversations with US military officials are expected to focus on Iraq’s changing security situation following the end of the US-led coalition’s combat campaign against ISIS. The negotiations come as Al-Zaidi’s administration seeks to enhance state authority by ensuring that all weapons remain under government control, while also working to modernize Iraq’s security institutions and bolster national sovereignty. Washington has consistently urged Baghdad to restrict the impact of Iran-backed armed groups and strengthen security under the Iraqi state, making military cooperation a critical component of the strategic alliance, alongside burgeoning economic and energy ties. Al-Zaidi’s tour to Washington has included investment, financial, and security diplomacy, highlighting Iraq’s aim to increase collaboration with the US while also pushing economic reforms and building national institutions.

articles.summaryKo:
미국 대통령 트럼프가 이라크의 새로운 총리 알리 알자이디를 환영하며 이란의 영향력을 줄이기 위한 압박을 지속하고 있다.
알자이디는 미국의 지원을 받아 경제 회복과 무장단체 해체를 약속하며, 미국과의 주요 석유 거래 가능성을 시사했다.
알자이디는 미국 군대의 철수 이후 무장단체의 무장 해제를 약속.
트럼프는 이라크와의 석유 거래를 통해 양국의 일자리 창출을 강조.
이라크는 여전히 이란과의 복잡한 관계를 유지하며 균형을 잡아야 하는 상황.
미국의 지원을 통해 이라크 경제 회복 필요.
articles.description: Washington — US President Donald Trump praised new Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Al-Zaidi as a “champion” in a meeting at the White House on Tuesday, even as Washington presses Baghdad […] US President Donald Trump shakes hands with Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi during a meeting at the White House in Washington, DC, on July 14, 2026. Washington — US President Donald Trump praised new Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Al-Zaidi as a “champion” in a meeting at the White House on Tuesday, even as Washington presses Baghdad to curb Iranian influence. Trump hinted at making major oil deals with Iraq as he hosted Al-Zaidi, a businessman who came to power this year with US blessing after Trump vetoed another candidate. “We have a fantastic champion, a new champion,” Trump said as he welcomed the Iraqi premier to the Oval Office. “He’s been a great fighter and a great fan of America.” Trump said he had even decided to hold an unscheduled lunch with Al-Zaidi because of their “tremendous chemistry.” The Iraqi’s visit comes against the backdrop of renewed military escalation between the United States and Iran. Washington and Tehran are Iraq’s main allies but have long fought a proxy war over the country. Al-Zaidi has vowed to boost Iraq’s fragile economy and disarm pro-Iran armed groups that have targeted US facilities. He said he would not accept any armed groups outside state control once US forces leave Iraq on September 30, when the US-led coalition’s mission ends. “On September 30th, American forces will leave, and American companies will enter,” Al-Zaidi said. “After 30 September, we will not allow any entity to bear arms outside the state.” Al-Zaidi arrived in Washington on Monday for his first international visit since assuming office — a week-long trip during which he will also meet US officials and representatives of oil companies. Trump hinted at likely oil deals with Iraq — a long-time obsession for a leader who earlier this year asserted control over Venezuela’s vast reserves after toppling its leader, Nicolas Maduro. “We’re going to be doing a lot of deals,” Trump said. “We’re going to create a lot of jobs for both countries, and we’re going to be taking out a lot of oil.” Al-Zaidi will, however, have to continue Iraq’s delicate balance between Washington and Tehran. A senior Iraqi politician told AFP on condition of anonymity that even if the current government adopts a more US-friendly path, prioritising the economy, “it doesn’t mean that Iraq is turning against Iran.” Last week, Iraq’s holy cities hosted a massive funeral procession for Iran’s late supreme leader Ali Khamenei, who was killed in a US-Israeli strike on Tehran as the war began in late February. articles.cleanText: US President Donald Trump shakes hands with Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi during a meeting at the White House in Washington, DC, on July 14, 2026. Washington — US President Donald Trump praised new Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Al-Zaidi as a “champion” in a meeting at the White House on Tuesday, even as Washington presses Baghdad to curb Iranian influence. Trump hinted at making major oil deals with Iraq as he hosted Al-Zaidi, a businessman who came to power this year with US blessing after Trump vetoed another candidate. “We have a fantastic champion, a new champion,” Trump said as he welcomed the Iraqi premier to the Oval Office. “He’s been a great fighter and a great fan of America.” Trump said he had even decided to hold an unscheduled lunch with Al-Zaidi because of their “tremendous chemistry.” The Iraqi’s visit comes against the backdrop of renewed military escalation between the United States and Iran. Washington and Tehran are Iraq’s main allies but have long fought a proxy war over the country. Al-Zaidi has vowed to boost Iraq’s fragile economy and disarm pro-Iran armed groups that have targeted US facilities. He said he would not accept any armed groups outside state control once US forces leave Iraq on September 30, when the US-led coalition’s mission ends. “On September 30th, American forces will leave, and American companies will enter,” Al-Zaidi said. “After 30 September, we will not allow any entity to bear arms outside the state.” Al-Zaidi arrived in Washington on Monday for his first international visit since assuming office — a week-long trip during which he will also meet US officials and representatives of oil companies. Trump hinted at likely oil deals with Iraq — a long-time obsession for a leader who earlier this year asserted control over Venezuela’s vast reserves after toppling its leader, Nicolas Maduro. “We’re going to be doing a lot of deals,” Trump said. “We’re going to create a lot of jobs for both countries, and we’re going to be taking out a lot of oil.” Al-Zaidi will, however, have to continue Iraq’s delicate balance between Washington and Tehran. A senior Iraqi politician told AFP on condition of anonymity that even if the current government adopts a more US-friendly path, prioritising the economy, “it doesn’t mean that Iraq is turning against Iran.” Last week, Iraq’s holy cities hosted a massive funeral procession for Iran’s late supreme leader Ali Khamenei, who was killed in a US-Israeli strike on Tehran as the war began in late February. While some armed groups said they will cooperate with Al-Zaidi, others remain firm in their refusal to disarm. Iraq’s pro-Iran armed groups have seen their political and financial clout increase over the years, and have long called for the withdrawal of American troops deployed as part of the anti-jihadist coalition. During the Middle East war, they intervened in support of Tehran, targeting US facilities in Iraq more than 600 times. Oil-rich Iraq has been trying to move past decades of war and unrest, but it still suffers from poor infrastructure, failing public services, mismanagement and endemic corruption. Trump, a long-term opponent of the 2003 US-led invasion of Iraq, said that Washington had “attacked the wrong country”, implying that it should have invaded Iran instead. In recent months, Iraq has signed several deals with US companies in the oil and gas sector. In the United States, Al-Zaidi is expected to sign more agreements, including one to establish a fund into which Iraq will deposit half a million barrels of oil per day in exchange for help to boost the country’s electricity supply. Like other oil producers, Iraq, a founding member of OPEC, was greatly affected by the Middle East war. It is hugely dependent on oil exports, which make up about 90 per cent of its budget revenues, and the vast majority of its crude travels via the disputed Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Iraq and United States deepen economic partnership - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 이라크, 미국과 경제 파트너십 강화
articles.summaryKo:
이라크 총리와 미국 대통령은 경제 협력을 증진하고 미국의 투자를 촉진하기로 합의하였다.
이라크는 군사 협력에서 투자와 상업으로 관계를 전환하고자 하며, 이는 국가 전역에 걸쳐 혜택을 공유할 것이라고 밝혔다.
이라크는 미국과의 관계를 군사적 협력에서 경제적 협력으로 전환할 계획.
미국 기업의 이라크 개발 프로젝트 참여를 확대할 방침.
양국은 투자 및 경제 개발에 중점을 둔 전략적 협력을 강화하기로 합의.
이라크의 경제 현대화 및 기술 발전 필요.
articles.description: Washington (IraqiNews.com) — Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Falih Al-Zaidi and US President Donald Trump agreed during discussions at the White House to boost economic cooperation, enhance strategic connections, and promote […] Washington (IraqiNews.com) — Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Falih Al-Zaidi and US President Donald Trump agreed during discussions at the White House to boost economic cooperation, enhance strategic connections, and promote more American investment, ushering in a new era in Baghdad-Washington relations. According to a statement released by the Prime Minister’s Office, the discussions focused on increasing US company participation in Iraq’s development projects, particularly in the energy sector, as well as reviewing security and intelligence cooperation and regional efforts to promote stability. According to Al-Zaidi, Iraq wants to shift its relationship with the United States away from military cooperation and toward investment, commerce, and long-term economic engagement. He said that now that the US-led coalition’s military campaign against ISIS has completed, there should be a greater focus on commercial connections and private-sector engagement. The Prime Minister described the partnership as linking one of the world’s oldest civilizations with one of its leading economic powers, stating that Iraq sees the United States as a strategic partner capable of assisting the country’s economic modernization, technological advancement, and long-term growth. He also said that the advantages of increased US-Iraq collaboration will be shared across the country, including the Kurdistan Region, Basra, Anbar, and all other governorates, confirming his administration’s commitment to balanced national growth and unity. Trump, for his part, emphasized the United States’ support for Iraq’s efforts to improve stability, develop economic reforms, and increase bilateral collaboration, while highlighting the country’s vital significance in global oil markets. The conference ended with both parties confirming their commitment to developing a larger strategic cooperation focused on investment, economic development, and shared regional interests, reflecting Baghdad’s efforts to attract foreign finance and expedite its reform program.

The conference ended with both parties confirming their commitment to developing a larger strategic cooperation focused on investment, economic development, and shared regional interests, reflecting Baghdad’s efforts to attract foreign finance and expedite its reform program.
articles.fullText: Washington (IraqiNews.com) — Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Falih Al-Zaidi and US President Donald Trump agreed during discussions at the White House to boost economic cooperation, enhance strategic connections, and promote more American investment, ushering in a new era in Baghdad-Washington relations. According to a statement released by the Prime Minister’s Office, the discussions focused on increasing US company participation in Iraq’s development projects, particularly in the energy sector, as well as reviewing security and intelligence cooperation and regional efforts to promote stability. According to Al-Zaidi, Iraq wants to shift its relationship with the United States away from military cooperation and toward investment, commerce, and long-term economic engagement. He said that now that the US-led coalition’s military campaign against ISIS has completed, there should be a greater focus on commercial connections and private-sector engagement. The Prime Minister described the partnership as linking one of the world’s oldest civilizations with one of its leading economic powers, stating that Iraq sees the United States as a strategic partner capable of assisting the country’s economic modernization, technological advancement, and long-term growth. He also said that the advantages of increased US-Iraq collaboration will be shared across the country, including the Kurdistan Region, Basra, Anbar, and all other governorates, confirming his administration’s commitment to balanced national growth and unity. Trump, for his part, emphasized the United States’ support for Iraq’s efforts to improve stability, develop economic reforms, and increase bilateral collaboration, while highlighting the country’s vital significance in global oil markets. The conference ended with both parties confirming their commitment to developing a larger strategic cooperation focused on investment, economic development, and shared regional interests, reflecting Baghdad’s efforts to attract foreign finance and expedite its reform program.

이는 이라크의 건설 및 투자 환경에 중대한 영향을 미칠 수 있는 사건이다.

이 과정에서 21개의 질문이 제기되었으며, 이는 투자 위원회의 투명성 문제를 부각시킨다.

articles.titleKo: 이라크 의회, 국가투자위원회 의장 해임 및 부패 조사 결정
articles.summaryKo:

articles.summaryKo: 미국의 공습으로 이라크 군인 10명이 사망하고 15명이 부상당한 사건이 발생하였다. 이 사건은 이라크와 미국 간의 관계에 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상된다.
articles.description: امنية إعلام إيراني: مقتل 10 عسكريين وإصابة 15 آخرين في القصف الأمريكي على بمبور الأربعاء 15 , تموز 2026 08:22 | امنية | عدد القراءات : 156 بغداد / نينا/ اعلنت وزارة التربية نتائج الامتحانات العامة للدراسة المهنية / الدور الأول، بجميع فروعها، للعام الدراسي (2025–2026)./انتهى9 رابط النتائج https://thankful-sea-0c283ca10.7.azurestaticapps.net/ الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 21:24 بغداد / نينا / اهتمت الصحف الصادرة في بغداد اليوم الاثنين ، الثالث عشر من تموز ، بزيارة رئيس مجلس الوزراء علي فالح الزيدي لواشنطن ، وتأثيرها في رسم مستقبل العلاقة بين العراق والولايات المتحدة .. وقالت صحيفة / الصباح / التي تصدر عن شبكة الاعلام العراقي :" بين متغيّراتٍ إقليميَّةٍ متسارعةٍ وطمو الاثنين 13 , تموز 2026 00:51 بغداد / نينا/ اهتمت صحيفتان عراقيتان صادرتان اليوم الأربعاء الثامن من تموز بمراسم تشييع جثمان المرشد الإيراني في النجف وكربلاء ، وإعداد إستراتيجية لتعظيم الإيرادات المحلية. وذكرت صحيفة /الزمان / - طبعة العراق ان محافظتي النجف وكربلاء تستقبل، جثمان المرشد الإيراني علي خامنئي، بعد انهاء تحضيرات ت الأربعاء 08 , تموز 2026 09:40

articles.titleKo: 이라크-미국 관계의 변화와 그 영향
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 총리의 미국 방문이 이라크와 미국 간의 관계에 중요한 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상된다. 이 방문은 지역의 빠른 변화 속에서 이루어졌으며, 이란과의 관계에도 영향을 미칠 가능성이 있다.

articles.title: Trump welcomes PM Al Zaidi to White House: 'I Love Iraq' - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 트럼프, 이라크 총리 알 자이디 백악관 초청
articles.summaryKo: 미국 대통령 트럼프가 이라크 총리 알리 팔리흐 알 자이디를 백악관에서 환영하였다. 이번 만남은 알 자이디 정부 출범 60일 만에 이루어진 것으로, 이라크의 정치적 안정성을 강조하는 계기가 되었다.
articles.description: U.S. President Donald Trump warmly welcomed Iraqi PM Ali Falih al-Zaidi to Washington, launching a high-stakes summit centered on economic partnerships and energy. US President Donald Trump welcoming Iraqi PM Al Zaidi to White House WASHINGTON, D.C. (IraqiNews.com) — In a highly anticipated diplomatic milestone, U.S. President Donald Trump received Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Falih al-Zaidi at the White House on Monday, July 13, 2026. The meeting marks the fastest official White House invitation extended to an Iraqi head of government in modern history, occurring just sixty days after the al-Zaidi administration assumed office in mid-May. Addressing reporters from the Oval Office, President Trump expressed immediate warmth toward the Iraqi delegation and praised the newly elected Prime Minister’s strong mandate. “We love Iraq,” President Trump said while welcoming Prime Minister al-Zaidi. “This man just won a big election. They are very well represented, I can tell you that.” The warm reception sets a cooperative tone for a high-stakes, multi-layered bilateral agenda. By explicitly highlighting al-Zaidi’s recent electoral success, President Trump signaled Washington’s recognition of Baghdad’s current political stability. This initial exchange has been widely interpreted by analysts as a mutual pivot away from traditional, purely security-focused diplomatic rhetoric toward a more transaction-oriented partnership.

articles.title: ايران تهدد برد مدمر اذا استهدفت امريكا جبل "بيكاكس"
articles.titleKo: 이란, 미국의 공격 시 강력한 보복 경고
articles.summaryKo: 이란의 고위 보안 책임자가 미국의 공격 위협에 대해 강력한 보복을 경고하였다. 미국의 공격 목표로 지목된 '비카크 산'에 대한 반응으로, 이란은 군인들이 대가를 치를 것이라고 주장하였다.
articles.description: miliq.news ايران تهدد برد مدمر اذا استهدفت امريكا جبل "بيكاكس" ايران تهدد برد مدمر اذا استهدفت امريكا جبل "بيكاكس" بغداد- ميل توعد مسؤول أمني إيراني رفيع، اليوم الثلاثاء، برد "مدمر" في حال نفذت الولايات المتحدة تهديداتها باستهداف "جبل بيكاكس"، مؤكداً أن القوات الأمريكية وشركاءها في المنطقة "سيدفعون الثمن ". وقال المسؤول في تصريحات لشبكة CNN ، : " إذا نفذ ترامب تهديداته، فسنوجه ردا مدمرا، وسيدفع الثمن الجنود الأمريكيون وشركاؤه في المنطقة ". وكان الرئيس الأمريكي دونالد ترامب قد أعلن أن الجبل، الواقع قرب منشأة نطنز النووية، مدرج ضمن قائمة الأهداف الأمريكية، مرجحاً توجيه ضربة إليه قريباً، فيما نفت طهران وجود أي أنشطة نووية في الموقع، ووصفت المزاعم الأمريكية بأنها "غير صحيحة ". جميع الحقوق محفوظة (ميل نيوز)

articles.title: نائب قائد العمليات المشتركة يصل إلى محافظة ميسان
articles.titleKo: 이라크 미산주에 공동작전 부사령관 도착
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 미산주에 공동작전 부사령관이 도착하였다. 이는 지역 안보와 관련된 중요한 조치로 해석된다.
articles.description: امنية نائب قائد العمليات المشتركة يصل إلى محافظة ميسان الأربعاء 15 , تموز 2026 08:40 | امنية | عدد القراءات : 162 بغداد / نينا/ اعلنت وزارة التربية نتائج الامتحانات العامة للدراسة المهنية / الدور الأول، بجميع فروعها، للعام الدراسي (2025–2026)./انتهى9 رابط النتائج https://thankful-sea-0c283ca10.7.azurestaticapps.net/ الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 21:24 بغداد / نينا / اهتمت الصحف الصادرة في بغداد اليوم الاثنين ، الثالث عشر من تموز ، بزيارة رئيس مجلس الوزراء علي فالح الزيدي لواشنطن ، وتأثيرها في رسم مستقبل العلاقة بين العراق والولايات المتحدة .. وقالت صحيفة / الصباح / التي تصدر عن شبكة الاعلام العراقي :" بين متغيّراتٍ إقليميَّةٍ متسارعةٍ وطمو الاثنين 13 , تموز 2026 00:51 بغداد / نينا/ اهتمت صحيفتان عراقيتان صادرتان اليوم الأربعاء الثامن من تموز بمراسم تشييع جثمان المرشد الإيراني في النجف وكربلاء ، وإعداد إستراتيجية لتعظيم الإيرادات المحلية. وذكرت صحيفة /الزمان / - طبعة العراق ان محافظتي النجف وكربلاء تستقبل، جثمان المرشد الإيراني علي خامنئي، بعد انهاء تحضيرات ت الأربعاء 08 , تموز 2026 09:40

articles.title: China's economic growth hits slowest pace in more than three years - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 중국 경제 성장률, 3년 만에 최저치 기록
articles.summaryKo: 중국의 경제 성장률이 3년 만에 가장 낮은 수준으로 떨어졌다. 수출 증가에도 불구하고 국내 소비 부진이 지속되며 성장 목표 달성에 어려움을 겪고 있다.
articles.description: China's economy grew at its weakest pace in more than three years during the second quarter, data showed Wednesday, missing expectations even as strong exports driven by the global AI boom helped offset trade... China’s surging exports have helped offset weak domestic consumption Beijing – China’s economy grew at its weakest pace in more than three years during the second quarter, data showed Wednesday, missing expectations even as strong exports driven by the global AI boom helped offset trade disruptions caused by the Middle East war. The 4.3 percent year-on-year expansion reported by the National Bureau of Statistics (NBS) for April-June, was short of the 4.5 percent forecast in an AFP survey of economists and the slowest growth since the fourth quarter of 2022. It was also short of the 4.5-5.0 percent annual rate targeted by Beijing, which is the lowest in decades. A years-long crisis in the property sector and a persistent slump in domestic spending have left leaders reliant on exports to meet growth targets. However, the US-Israeli war on Iran has threatened that as it chokes shipping through the Strait of Hormuz — a vital transit route through which a fifth of global oil and natural gas normally passes. \”In the first half of the year, the national economy operated within a reasonable range,\” the NBS said in a statement. \”There are many unstable and uncertain external factors, and the domestic contradiction of strong supply and weak demand is prominent. The foundation for the economy to improve still needs to be consolidated,\” it added. The NBS data also showed retail sales grew 1.0 year-on-year in June, beating a Bloomberg forecast of a 0.1 percent drop. And industrial production rose 5.3 percent last month, topping a Bloomberg estimate of 4.6 percent. But in a gloomy sign, fixed-asset investment slid 5.7 percent on-year in the first half. – AI-driven export boom – Domestic demand dampened by low income expectations remains China’s \”weakest link\”, Yue Su of The Economist Intelligence Unit told AFP. \”We therefore expect policymakers to place greater emphasis on boosting consumption in the second half of the year and into early 2027\” through fiscal stimulus packages, increased minimum wages or directing wage growth towards frontline workers, she said. But analyst Zhang Zhiwei said the government was unlikely to change its policy stance in the coming months as a result of the latest figures. \”We need to keep in mind that the first-quarter GDP growth was strong at five percent. This means the government is still on track to deliver growth in line with the official (annual) target they set at 4.5-5 percent,\” Zhang wrote in a note. \”The export boom just continues to beat expectations, and it will likely remain strong in the short term,\” he added. The closely watched figures followed data Tuesday that showed exports surged a forecast-topping 27.0 percent year-on-year in June as the global AI boom helped fuel demand for chips and computing equipme
articles.cleanText: China’s surging exports have helped offset weak domestic consumption Beijing – China’s economy grew at its weakest pace in more than three years during the second quarter, data showed Wednesday, missing expectations even as strong exports driven by the global AI boom helped offset trade disruptions caused by the Middle East war. The 4.3 percent year-on-year expansion reported by the National Bureau of Statistics (NBS) for April-June, was short of the 4.5 percent forecast in an AFP survey of economists and the slowest growth since the fourth quarter of 2022. It was also short of the 4.5-5.0 percent annual rate targeted by Beijing, which is the lowest in decades. A years-long crisis in the property sector and a persistent slump in domestic spending have left leaders reliant on exports to meet growth targets. However, the US-Israeli war on Iran has threatened that as it chokes shipping through the Strait of Hormuz — a vital transit route through which a fifth of global oil and natural gas normally passes. \”In the first half of the year, the national economy operated within a reasonable range,\” the NBS said in a statement. \”There are many unstable and uncertain external factors, and the domestic contradiction of strong supply and weak demand is prominent. The foundation for the economy to improve still needs to be consolidated,\” it added. The NBS data also showed retail sales grew 1.0 year-on-year in June, beating a Bloomberg forecast of a 0.1 percent drop. And industrial production rose 5.3 percent last month, topping a Bloomberg estimate of 4.6 percent. But in a gloomy sign, fixed-asset investment slid 5.7 percent on-year in the first half. – AI-driven export boom – Domestic demand dampened by low income expectations remains China’s \”weakest link\”, Yue Su of The Economist Intelligence Unit told AFP. \”We therefore expect policymakers to place greater emphasis on boosting consumption in the second half of the year and into early 2027\” through fiscal stimulus packages, increased minimum wages or directing wage growth towards frontline workers, she said. But analyst Zhang Zhiwei said the government was unlikely to change its policy stance in the coming months as a result of the latest figures. \”We need to keep in mind that the first-quarter GDP growth was strong at five percent. This means the government is still on track to deliver growth in line with the official (annual) target they set at 4.5-5 percent,\” Zhang wrote in a note. \”The export boom just continues to beat expectations, and it will likely remain strong in the short term,\” he added. The closely watched figures followed data Tuesday that showed exports surged a forecast-topping 27.0 percent year-on-year in June as the global AI boom helped fuel demand for chips and computing equipment. China’s semiconductor exports more than doubled in value in June year-on-year, while data-processing equipment shipments rose 53.1 percent from a year earlier. But that expansion was \”entirely a price story caused by the ongoing shortage of memory chips\”, Julian Evans-Pritchard of Capital Economics said Tuesday, noting that the volume of semiconductor exports actually fell year-on-year in June. Tensions with the United States and European Union remain a source of friction. China remains locked in a simmering trade feud with the EU, with which it recorded a trade surplus of $32.9 billion in June. And while ties between Washington and Beijing have stabilised since US President Donald Trump visited Beijing in May, a trade imbalance and rivalry over chip production persist.

detailsKo: 중국의 2분기 경제 성장률은 4.3%로, 예상치인 4.5%를 하회함.
수출 증가가 국내 소비 부진을 상쇄하고 있으나, 중동 전쟁으로 인해 해운에 차질이 발생하고 있음.
고정자산 투자가 5.7% 감소하며 경제 회복의 기초가 약화되고 있음.

articles.description: أكد رئيس الوزراء علي الزيدي، الأربعاء، أن العراق يتطلع إلى بناء علاقات متوازنة ومستدامة مع الولايات المتحدة. ​ الزيدي: العراق يتطلع لبناء علاقات متوازنة ومستدامة مع أمريكا أكد رئيس الوزراء علي الزيدي ، الأربعاء، أن العراق يتطلع إلى بناء علاقات متوازنة ومستدامة مع الولايات المتحدة . ​ الولايات المتحدة الأمريكية

articles.title: AI ignites 'ignored sector' for Japan chipmaker Kioxia - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 일본 반도체 기업 Kioxia, AI 데이터 센터 수요로 성장
articles.summaryKo: Kioxia는 AI 데이터 센터 구축의 글로벌 경쟁에서 혜택을 보고 있으며, 메모리 반도체 가격이 급등하고 있다. 이 회사는 올해 주가가 약 7배 상승하며 일본에서 가장 큰 기업으로 부상했다.
articles.description: Robotic transporters carrying silicon wafers whizz by on overhead rails at a new factory that Kioxia, one of Japan's most valuable companies, hopes can help... Kioxia, one of Japan’s most valuable companies, is reaping rewards from the global race to build AI data centres Kitakami – Robotic transporters carrying silicon wafers whizz by on overhead rails at a new factory that Kioxia, one of Japan’s most valuable companies, hopes can help it meet overwhelming AI-driven demand. The global race to build artificial intelligence data centres has turbocharged business for chipmakers, creating shortages and sending prices soaring for memory components in particular. And Kioxia is reaping the rewards. While it is barely known outside the tech industry, its share price has soared around seven-fold this year, and in June it briefly became the largest Japanese firm by market capitalisation after speeding past Toyota. Other once-obscure tech supply chain players in Asia are also hitting the big time, such as South Korea’s SK hynix, which last week listed on Wall Street after one of the world’s biggest ever stock sales. Different types of memory chips that store digital information are used in AI systems alongside powerful processors able to crunch data to generate chatbot responses or realistic images. AI use \”has been expanding rapidly\” so \”we have high expectations that the market for the flash memory we produce will continue to expand\”, Kioxia CEO Hiroo Ota said this month at the new chip fab that opened in September in northern Japan. The company specialises in so-called NAND flash chips, an increasingly hot commodity as AI agents — tools that can carry out tasks for users — require ever-more storage space. – Chinese competition – \”Kioxia’s stock price surge represents a normalisation of valuation for what was once an ‘ignored sector’,\” Counterpoint Research analyst MS Hwang told AFP. One challenge will be \”maintaining its competitive edge against rivalry\” from China’s Yangtze Memory Technologies Co (YMTC), a rapidly expanding maker of the same type of chips, Hwang said. Broader concerns of overstretched valuations have also fuelled fears of a market bubble, along with questions over when the eye-watering sums being spent on AI will reap returns. The new fab is Kioxia’s second facility in the green outskirts of the city of Kitakami, an area with several other big factories. AFP was shown rows of bulky white chip-etching machines in a cleanroom, where conditions are closely controlled to stop dust contamination. Near Kitakami station, Noriyuki Takahashi, a 47-year-old recruiter, said work has been busy lately thanks to Kioxia. \”It’s a good thing to have so many jobs here experiencing improving business sentiment,\” he told AFP. Hana, 57, who runs the bar Tachinomi Hanachan, had a less rosy perspective. \”Semiconductors are an industry with a lot of ups and downs,\” she said. \”The locals are anxious about ho
articles.cleanText: Kioxia, one of Japan’s most valuable companies, is reaping rewards from the global race to build AI data centres Kitakami – Robotic transporters carrying silicon wafers whizz by on overhead rails at a new factory that Kioxia, one of Japan’s most valuable companies, hopes can help it meet overwhelming AI-driven demand. The global race to build artificial intelligence data centres has turbocharged business for chipmakers, creating shortages and sending prices soaring for memory components in particular. And Kioxia is reaping the rewards. While it is barely known outside the tech industry, its share price has soared around seven-fold this year, and in June it briefly became the largest Japanese firm by market capitalisation after speeding past Toyota. Other once-obscure tech supply chain players in Asia are also hitting the big time, such as South Korea’s SK hynix, which last week listed on Wall Street after one of the world’s biggest ever stock sales. Different types of memory chips that store digital information are used in AI systems alongside powerful processors able to crunch data to generate chatbot responses or realistic images. AI use \”has been expanding rapidly\” so \”we have high expectations that the market for the flash memory we produce will continue to expand\”, Kioxia CEO Hiroo Ota said this month at the new chip fab that opened in September in northern Japan. The company specialises in so-called NAND flash chips, an increasingly hot commodity as AI agents — tools that can carry out tasks for users — require ever-more storage space. – Chinese competition – \”Kioxia’s stock price surge represents a normalisation of valuation for what was once an ‘ignored sector’,\” Counterpoint Research analyst MS Hwang told AFP. One challenge will be \”maintaining its competitive edge against rivalry\” from China’s Yangtze Memory Technologies Co (YMTC), a rapidly expanding maker of the same type of chips, Hwang said. Broader concerns of overstretched valuations have also fuelled fears of a market bubble, along with questions over when the eye-watering sums being spent on AI will reap returns. The new fab is Kioxia’s second facility in the green outskirts of the city of Kitakami, an area with several other big factories. AFP was shown rows of bulky white chip-etching machines in a cleanroom, where conditions are closely controlled to stop dust contamination. Near Kitakami station, Noriyuki Takahashi, a 47-year-old recruiter, said work has been busy lately thanks to Kioxia. \”It’s a good thing to have so many jobs here experiencing improving business sentiment,\” he told AFP. Hana, 57, who runs the bar Tachinomi Hanachan, had a less rosy perspective. \”Semiconductors are an industry with a lot of ups and downs,\” she said. \”The locals are anxious about how long it will last.\” In its 1980s heyday, Japan commanded around half the share of the global semiconductor market. That has since dropped to less than 10 percent, says the government, which is aiming for an eightfold revenue increase from domestically produced microchips by 2040 from 2020 levels. The country is building a chip hub with top-end technology in northern Hokkaido, while Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC has a plant in southern Kyushu. Some analysts say AI has brought a new dimension to the dramatic boom-and-bust cycles the memory chip industry is known for. Kioxia started life as Toshiba Memory, a pioneering memory chip business that Japanese conglomerate Toshiba, then in dire financial straits, sold off in 2018. Now the company says it is planning a US listing like SK hynix, forecasting 1.3 trillion yen ($8 billion) in operating profit for April-June — a massive jump from 45 billion yen a year ago. Some workers in Kitakami boast of bonuses that are \”impossibly high\” for the region, Hana told AFP. But competition is fierce, and \”Taiwan is working hard, other places are working hard\”, she added. \”It’s good for the moment, but when we ask how many years the demand will continue, the local community is looking at it with unease.\”

articles.titleKo: 이라크 국경군, 외국인 밀입국 시도 저지
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 국경군이 다호크와 와세트에서 44명의 외국인 밀입국 시도를 저지하였다. 이 사건은 이라크의 안보 상황을 반영하며, 국경 통제의 중요성을 강조한다.
articles.description: امنية قوات الحدود تحبط محاولة تسلل (44) أجنبياً في دهوك وواسط الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 23:54 | امنية | عدد القراءات : 353 بغداد / نينا/ اعلنت وزارة التربية نتائج الامتحانات العامة للدراسة المهنية / الدور الأول، بجميع فروعها، للعام الدراسي (2025–2026)./انتهى9 رابط النتائج https://thankful-sea-0c283ca10.7.azurestaticapps.net/ الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 21:24 بغداد / نينا / اهتمت الصحف الصادرة في بغداد اليوم الاثنين ، الثالث عشر من تموز ، بزيارة رئيس مجلس الوزراء علي فالح الزيدي لواشنطن ، وتأثيرها في رسم مستقبل العلاقة بين العراق والولايات المتحدة .. وقالت صحيفة / الصباح / التي تصدر عن شبكة الاعلام العراقي :" بين متغيّراتٍ إقليميَّةٍ متسارعةٍ وطمو الاثنين 13 , تموز 2026 00:51 بغداد / نينا/ اهتمت صحيفتان عراقيتان صادرتان اليوم الأربعاء الثامن من تموز بمراسم تشييع جثمان المرشد الإيراني في النجف وكربلاء ، وإعداد إستراتيجية لتعظيم الإيرادات المحلية. وذكرت صحيفة /الزمان / - طبعة العراق ان محافظتي النجف وكربلاء تستقبل، جثمان المرشد الإيراني علي خامنئي، بعد انهاء تحضيرات ت الأربعاء 08 , تموز 2026 09:40

articles.description: اقتصادية وزيرا النفط والكهرباء يبحثان مع نائب وزير الطاقة الأمريكي تعزيز التعاون في قطاع الطاقة الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 23:51 | اقتصادية | عدد القراءات : 356 بغداد / نينا/ اعلنت وزارة التربية نتائج الامتحانات العامة للدراسة المهنية / الدور الأول، بجميع فروعها، للعام الدراسي (2025–2026)./انتهى9 رابط النتائج https://thankful-sea-0c283ca10.7.azurestaticapps.net/ الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 21:24 بغداد / نينا / اهتمت الصحف الصادرة في بغداد اليوم الاثنين ، الثالث عشر من تموز ، بزيارة رئيس مجلس الوزراء علي فالح الزيدي لواشنطن ، وتأثيرها في رسم مستقبل العلاقة بين العراق والولايات المتحدة .. وقالت صحيفة / الصباح / التي تصدر عن شبكة الاعلام العراقي :" بين متغيّراتٍ إقليميَّةٍ متسارعةٍ وطمو الاثنين 13 , تموز 2026 00:51 بغداد / نينا/ اهتمت صحيفتان عراقيتان صادرتان اليوم الأربعاء الثامن من تموز بمراسم تشييع جثمان المرشد الإيراني في النجف وكربلاء ، وإعداد إستراتيجية لتعظيم الإيرادات المحلية. وذكرت صحيفة /الزمان / - طبعة العراق ان محافظتي النجف وكربلاء تستقبل، جثمان المرشد الإيراني علي خامنئي، بعد انهاء تحضيرات ت الأربعاء 08 , تموز 2026 09:40

articles.title: مباحثات بين وزير النفط العراقي والطاقة الامريكية بشأن التعاون المشترك
articles.titleKo: 이라크 석유부 장관과 미국 에너지부 간 협력 논의
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 석유부 장관이 미국 에너지부 부장관과 에너지 분야의 협력 가능성을 논의하였다. 회의에는 전력부 장관과 바스라 석유회사 및 석유 마케팅 회사의 고위 관계자들도 참석하였다.
articles.description: miliq.news مباحثات بين وزير النفط العراقي والطاقة الامريكية بشأن التعاون المشترك مباحثات بين وزير النفط العراقي والطاقة الامريكية بشأن التعاون المشترك بغداد- ميل بحث وزير النفط باسم محمد خضير العبادي، مع نائب وزير الطاقة الأمريكي جيمس دانلي، آفاق التعاون المشترك في مجال الطاقة. وذكرت وزارة النفط في بيان، أن "وزير النفط باسم محمد خضير العبادي، التقى نائب وزير الطاقة الأمريكي جيمس دانلي، بحضور وزير الكهرباء علي سعدي وهيب، ومدير عام شركة نفط البصرة باسم عبدالكريم، ومدير عام شركة تسويق النفط "سومو" علي نزار". وأضافت، أن "الجانبين عقدا اجتماعاً تم خلاله بحث آفاق التعاون المشترك بين البلدين في مجال الطاقة". جميع الحقوق محفوظة (ميل نيوز)

articles.title: IBM shares plunge as AI spending boom disrupts business - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: IBM 주가 급락, AI 지출 증가로 사업 혼란
articles.summaryKo: IBM의 주가는 실망스러운 2분기 예비 결과 발표 이후 24% 하락하였다. 고객들이 메모리 칩과 AI 관련 인프라의 가격 상승을 예상하며 하드웨어 구매에 몰리면서 IBM의 매출이 감소하였다.
articles.description: Shares in IBM plunged 24 percent on Tuesday after the US tech giant released disappointing preliminary second-quarter results, blaming a shift in spending by customers due to expected higher prices... IBM said many of its big corporate customers rushed to buy AI-related hardware to get ahead of expected price increases Washington – Shares in IBM plunged 24 percent on Tuesday after the US tech giant released disappointing preliminary second-quarter results, blaming a shift in spending by customers due to expected higher prices for memory chips and other AI-related infrastructure. \”We did not adapt and move quickly enough,\” IBM CEO Arvind Krishna said in a letter to investors. The company said revenue for the three months ending in June came in at $17.2 billion, up just one percent. A global rush by tech companies to build out artificial intelligence infrastructure has sent demand for servers, memory chips and storage soaring, driving up prices and creating supply shortages across the industry. IBM said that toward the end of June, many of its big corporate customers rushed to buy up hardware to get ahead of expected price increases. That shopping spree pulled spending away from IBM’s higher-margin mainframe computers, the powerful machines used by banks and large corporations to process millions of transactions, and related software. IBM’s infrastructure business — which includes its flagship mainframe line — saw revenue fall seven percent. Software revenue grew five percent but still came in below expectations. Cybersecurity concerns across the tech industry also distracted clients during the quarter, IBM said, and a number of large deals failed to close on time. Those concerns were brought on by the release of Anthropic’s Mythos AI model, which has raised alarm bells for its capabilities to find weaknesses in computer networks that can be taken advantage of by hackers. In response, companies have worked to build up their cyber defenses instead of previously planned spending, analysts said. The tailspin by IBM will increase talk of the consequences of the AI revolution on traditional software companies — known as Software as a Service, or SaaS firms — of which IBM is an important member alongside companies like Salesforce, Adobe and Intuit. Shares in those companies were trading lower on Tuesday after the IBM warning. Earlier this year, Wall Street went into a brief frenzy, dubbed the SaaS-pocalypse, after analysts predicted that the sector was doomed due to the ability of AI models to provide everyday users the same capabilities. On the positive side, IBM’s Red Hat unit, which sells open-source software, posted 11 percent revenue growth. The company’s server and storage business outside of mainframes surged 37 percent as clients snapped up that equipment. IBM also announced Lightwell, a $5 billion initiative to fix vulnerabilities in open-source software, with backing from major banks including Bank of America, JPMorganChase and Goldman Sachs.

articles.description: عامة الانواء الجوية: طقس صحو و ارتفاع بدرجات الحرارة خلال الايام المقبلة الأربعاء 15 , تموز 2026 08:44 | عامة | عدد القراءات : 157 بغداد / نينا/ اعلنت وزارة التربية نتائج الامتحانات العامة للدراسة المهنية / الدور الأول، بجميع فروعها، للعام الدراسي (2025–2026)./انتهى9 رابط النتائج https://thankful-sea-0c283ca10.7.azurestaticapps.net/ الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 21:24 بغداد / نينا / اهتمت الصحف الصادرة في بغداد اليوم الاثنين ، الثالث عشر من تموز ، بزيارة رئيس مجلس الوزراء علي فالح الزيدي لواشنطن ، وتأثيرها في رسم مستقبل العلاقة بين العراق والولايات المتحدة .. وقالت صحيفة / الصباح / التي تصدر عن شبكة الاعلام العراقي :" بين متغيّراتٍ إقليميَّةٍ متسارعةٍ وطمو الاثنين 13 , تموز 2026 00:51 بغداد / نينا/ اهتمت صحيفتان عراقيتان صادرتان اليوم الأربعاء الثامن من تموز بمراسم تشييع جثمان المرشد الإيراني في النجف وكربلاء ، وإعداد إستراتيجية لتعظيم الإيرادات المحلية. وذكرت صحيفة /الزمان / - طبعة العراق ان محافظتي النجف وكربلاء تستقبل، جثمان المرشد الإيراني علي خامنئي، بعد انهاء تحضيرات ت الأربعاء 08 , تموز 2026 09:40

articles.title: الحكيم يبارك للصابئة المندائيين في العراق والعالم بمناسبة عيدهم الكبير (دهفا ربا)
articles.titleKo: 이라크, 수비아 민족의 큰 명절 축하
articles.summaryKo: 이라크의 수비아 민족이 큰 명절을 맞아 축하를 받았다. 이와 함께 이라크 정부는 교육 분야의 성과를 발표하며, 미국과의 관계에 대한 논의가 진행되고 있다.
articles.description: سياسية الحكيم يبارك للصابئة المندائيين في العراق والعالم بمناسبة عيدهم الكبير (دهفا ربا) الأربعاء 15 , تموز 2026 08:24 | سياسية | عدد القراءات : 155 بغداد / نينا/ اعلنت وزارة التربية نتائج الامتحانات العامة للدراسة المهنية / الدور الأول، بجميع فروعها، للعام الدراسي (2025–2026)./انتهى9 رابط النتائج https://thankful-sea-0c283ca10.7.azurestaticapps.net/ الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 21:24 بغداد / نينا / اهتمت الصحف الصادرة في بغداد اليوم الاثنين ، الثالث عشر من تموز ، بزيارة رئيس مجلس الوزراء علي فالح الزيدي لواشنطن ، وتأثيرها في رسم مستقبل العلاقة بين العراق والولايات المتحدة .. وقالت صحيفة / الصباح / التي تصدر عن شبكة الاعلام العراقي :" بين متغيّراتٍ إقليميَّةٍ متسارعةٍ وطمو الاثنين 13 , تموز 2026 00:51 بغداد / نينا/ اهتمت صحيفتان عراقيتان صادرتان اليوم الأربعاء الثامن من تموز بمراسم تشييع جثمان المرشد الإيراني في النجف وكربلاء ، وإعداد إستراتيجية لتعظيم الإيرادات المحلية. وذكرت صحيفة /الزمان / - طبعة العراق ان محافظتي النجف وكربلاء تستقبل، جثمان المرشد الإيراني علي خامنئي، بعد انهاء تحضيرات ت الأربعاء 08 , تموز 2026 09:40

articles.title: 10 ضحايا اثر حادث سير في الانبار
articles.titleKo: 이라크 앤바르주 교통사고로 10명 사망
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 앤바르주에서 발생한 교통사고로 10명이 사망하고 3명이 중상을 입었다. 사고는 히트-바그다디 도로에서 발생했으며, 현재 부상자들은 치료를 받고 있다.
articles.description: miliq.news 10 ضحايا اثر حادث سير في الانبار 10 ضحايا اثر حادث سير في الانبار بغداد- ميل أعلن مدير إعلام دائرة صحة الأنبار، محمد القيسي، اليوم الثلاثاء، عن ارتفاع حصيلة الحادث المروري الذي وقع على طريق هيت – البغدادي. وقال القيسي في بيان، إن الحادث أسفر عن مصرع سبعة أشخاص، بينهم نساء وأطفال، وإصابة ثلاثة آخرين بجروح خطرة. وأضاف أن المصابين يتلقون حالياً العلاج في مستشفى هيت العام، فيما تواصل الجهات الصحية والأمنية متابعة الحادث واستكمال الإجراءات اللازمة، مع احتمال تحديث أعداد الضحايا في حال ورود معلومات جديدة. جميع الحقوق محفوظة (ميل نيوز)
articles.cleanText: 10 ضحايا اثر حادث سير في الانبار 10 ضحايا اثر حادث سير في الانبار بغداد- ميل أعلن مدير إعلام دائرة صحة الأنبار، محمد القيسي، اليوم الثلاثاء، عن ارتفاع حصيلة الحادث المروري الذي وقع على طريق هيت – البغدادي. وقال القيسي في بيان، إن الحادث أسفر عن مصرع سبعة أشخاص، بينهم نساء وأطفال، وإصابة ثلاثة آخرين بجروح خطرة. وأضاف أن المصابين يتلقون حالياً العلاج في مستشفى هيت العام، فيما تواصل الجهات الصحية والأمنية متابعة الحادث واستكمال الإجراءات اللازمة، مع احتمال تحديث أعداد الضحايا في حال ورود معلومات جديدة. جميع الحقوق محفوظة (ميل نيوز)

articles.titleKo: 이라크 교육부, 전문학습 시험 결과 발표
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 교육부가 2025-2026 학년도 전문학습 시험의 결과를 발표하였다. 이 발표는 이라크 내 교육 시스템의 현황을 반영하는 중요한 지표로 작용할 수 있다.
articles.description: عامة وزارة التربية تُعلن نتائج الامتحانات العامة للدراسة المهنية بجميع فروعها الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 21:24 | عامة | عدد القراءات : 6152 بغداد / نينا/ اعلنت وزارة التربية نتائج الامتحانات العامة للدراسة المهنية / الدور الأول، بجميع فروعها، للعام الدراسي (2025–2026)./انتهى9 رابط النتائج https://thankful-sea-0c283ca10.7.azurestaticapps.net/ الثلاثاء 14 , تموز 2026 21:24 بغداد / نينا / اهتمت الصحف الصادرة في بغداد اليوم الاثنين ، الثالث عشر من تموز ، بزيارة رئيس مجلس الوزراء علي فالح الزيدي لواشنطن ، وتأثيرها في رسم مستقبل العلاقة بين العراق والولايات المتحدة .. وقالت صحيفة / الصباح / التي تصدر عن شبكة الاعلام العراقي :" بين متغيّراتٍ إقليميَّةٍ متسارعةٍ وطمو الاثنين 13 , تموز 2026 00:51 بغداد / نينا/ اهتمت صحيفتان عراقيتان صادرتان اليوم الأربعاء الثامن من تموز بمراسم تشييع جثمان المرشد الإيراني في النجف وكربلاء ، وإعداد إستراتيجية لتعظيم الإيرادات المحلية. وذكرت صحيفة /الزمان / - طبعة العراق ان محافظتي النجف وكربلاء تستقبل، جثمان المرشد الإيراني علي خامنئي، بعد انهاء تحضيرات ت الأربعاء 08 , تموز 2026 09:40

detailsKo: 전문학습 시험 결과 발표는 이라크 교육부의 공식 발표에 따른 것임.
시험 결과는 이라크의 교육 정책 및 향후 교육 방향에 영향을 미칠 가능성이 있음.
articles.reportBullet: 7.14, 이라크 교육부, 전문학습 시험 결과 발표.
reportSubBullets: 이 발표는 이라크 내 교육 시스템의 현황을 반영.
향후 교육 정책 수립에 중요한 기초 자료로 활용 가능.
articles.reportImplication: 교육 성과는 국가 발전과 직결되며, 건설 및 인프라 투자에 긍정적 영향을 미칠 수 있음.

articles.title: قناة الأولى | أخبار العراق والعالم والبث المباشر
articles.titleKo: 이라크 최신 뉴스 및 동향
articles.summaryKo: 이라크와 중동의 최신 뉴스가 보도되었다. 경제 및 정치적 상황에 대한 업데이트가 포함되어 있다.
articles.description: تابع آخر أخبار العراق والعالم والشرق الأوسط والاقتصاد والرياضة والتكنولوجيا عبر قناة الأولى.
detailsKo: 이라크 경제와 관련된 다양한 이슈가 다루어짐.
중동 지역의 정치적 동향이 언급됨.
articles.reportBullet: 6.21, 이라크, 최신 뉴스 및 동향 보도.
reportSubBullets: 이라크 경제 상황에 대한 분석 필요.
중동 정치 동향에 대한 지속적인 모니터링 필요.
articles.reportImplication: 이라크의 경제 및 정치적 상황이 건설 사업에 영향을 미칠 가능성.
